subcodes.first_line: Bear thou witness within thyself that there is no God but Him, the Mighty, the Best-Beloved, and in Him Who sent forth His servant [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان اشهد فی نفسک بانه لا اله الا هو العزیز المحبوب و بالذی ارسله لعبده و
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @fellowship with the wayward and ungodly, @chastisement and requital, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
